query: UPDATE `users` SET `openId` = CONCAT('user_', `id`) WHERE `openId` IS NULL OR `openId` = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3wKQiSqrPN67m7B.4d5bbfb3d938 --database iBKAWjX8tWqzHTj4SwcNCQ --execute UPDATE `users` SET `openId` = CONCAT('user_', `id`) WHERE `openId` IS NULL OR `openId` = '';
